$comment: Rust-backend config (see codegen_rs/PHASE2-DESIGN.md). includeFiles: emission allowlist (discovery always parses all of src/). statefulContracts get a <Name>State in the generated World; flatten merges base contracts into the child's module/state. interfaceAliases route interface-value calls to the single transpiled impl; externalInterfaces route to world.ext (harness mocks); everything else stubs loudly until the Phase-3 dispatch enums. stubCalls are bare names from non-transpiled bases (EIP712 dual-signed flow — on-chain-only).
